blocks.title: 📘 RUNNING A MEETING · frases clave
blocks.intro: En B1, no solo participas en reuniones: las diriges. Aprende a estructurar, estar de acuerdo o discrepar, e interrumpir con educación. Repasa y luego practica.

cells.body:
Let's get started.
Let's move on to…
Let's wrap up. (cerrar)

I see your point, but…
I'm not sure I agree.
I'd say…

Sorry to jump in, but…
Can I add something?
Could you clarify that?

You're wrong. (brusco)
I see your point, but I'm not sure that works.

blocks.ladderLabel: Escala de diplomacia — de brusco (✗) a profesional (✓). En el trabajo, movete a la derecha:
ladder: That's a good idea, though maybe…
blocks.note: Cómo funciona: esta lección mezcla unir 🔗, elegir respuestas 💬, escucha 🎧 y ordenar 🧩. Hacé el ✓ CHECK en cada ejercicio.

blocks.title: ★ MARCOS LEADS THE STANDUP
blocks.intro: Sofia confía en Marcos para dirigir el standup diario por primera vez. Pero Priya está mirando, y la agenda se complica: el cliente pide un cambio de último minuto. Marcos tiene que mantener el control… con diplomacia.

cast.sp: hoy dirige el standup
la team lead
la Project Director

blocks.title: UNÍ LA FRASE CON SU FUNCIÓN
blocks.intro: Tocá la frase en inglés y luego su función en una reunión.

blocks.title: ELEGÍ LA RESPUESTA DIPLOMÁTICA
blocks.intro: Estás en una reunión. Elegí la opción más profesional y educada.

lines.html: We're behind schedule. I think we should cancel the new feature.

options: I see your point, but maybe we could delay it instead of cancelling?

lines.html: Marcos, can you summarise where we are with GreenMarket?

options: Sure. So far, we've finished the design and we're testing the payments.

lines.html: …and back in 2019 we also tried a different layout, and then we changed the colours, and…

options: Sorry to jump in, but can we focus on the next steps?

lines.html: So, are we all agreed on the new plan?

options: Yes, I think we're all on the same page. Let's wrap up.

blocks.title: AUDIO 1 · THE STANDUP
blocks.desc: Marcos dirige el standup. El cliente quiere una función nueva. ¿Cómo lo maneja Marcos?
blocks.speakers: 🗣 Marcos + Sofia + Priya

questions.q: What does the client want to add?
What does Marcos suggest about the new feature?
options: Plan it for the next phase

questions.q: They agree to launch the site on Friday.

speaking.prompt: How did Marcos disagree with Priya politely? Give the phrase he used and what he suggested.
speaking.starter: He said, 'I see your point, but…', and he suggested they…

transcript.html: Okay everyone, let's get started. This is a quick standup, so let's keep it short. Sofia, could you start with GreenMarket?
Sure. We've finished the design, and Marcos has just tested the payments. So we're on track for Friday.
Thanks, Sofia. Let's move on to the next steps. Priya, you wanted to add something?
Yes. The client has asked for a new feature — a live chat. I think we should add it this week.
I see your point, but if we add it now, we might miss the deadline. Could we plan it for the next phase?
Hmm. But the client really wants it.
Sorry to jump in — what if we show them a demo first, and add the chat next week?
That's a good idea. Let's do that.
Great. So, to confirm the next steps: we launch on Friday, and we start the live chat on Monday. Are we all agreed?
Agreed.
Perfect. Let's wrap up. Thanks, everyone.

blocks.title: ORDENÁ LA FRASE DIPLOMÁTICA
blocks.intro: Tocá las palabras para formar frases educadas de reunión.

items.answer: Could we focus on the next steps

blocks.title: AUDIO 2 · THE CLIENT SYNC
blocks.desc: Marcos llama a David. El cliente presiona por la función nueva. Marcos gestiona sus expectativas.
blocks.speakers: 🗣 Marcos + David

questions.q: When does Marcos suggest launching the live chat?
Why doesn't Marcos want to add the chat by Friday?
David agrees with Marcos's suggestion in the end.

speaking.prompt: How did Marcos manage David's expectations? Use I understand… and I'd suggest….
speaking.starter: He said he understood it was important, but he'd suggest they launch the main site first and…

transcript.html: Hi David, thanks for joining. I wanted to update you on the project and the new live chat.
Hi Marcos. Yes, the chat is really important for us. Can you add it by Friday?
I understand it's important. The thing is, if we add it by Friday, we might rush it and cause bugs.
I see. So what do you suggest?
I'd suggest we launch the main site on Friday as planned, and add the live chat next week. That way it's stable.
Hmm. Can you guarantee the chat for next Monday?
Yes, I'm confident we can have it ready by Monday. We'll test it properly first.
Okay, that sounds reasonable. Let's do that.
Great. I'll send you a summary email with the next steps. Thanks for understanding, David.
No problem. Thanks, Marcos.

blocks.title: ✍️ THE RECAP EMAIL
blocks.intro: Después de una reunión, escribe un email corto (5–7 frases) con el resumen y los próximos pasos:
checklist: Saluda y di de qué reunión se trata (Following our meeting today…)
Usa una frase para proponer con tacto (I'd suggest…)
Lista los next steps con responsables y fechas
Cierra (Let me know if you have any questions.)
blocks.placeholder: Hi team, Following our meeting today,
blocks.example: Hi team, Following our meeting today, here's a quick recap. We agreed to launch the GreenMarket site on Friday. We also agreed to add the live chat next week, not now — I'd suggest we test it properly first to avoid bugs. Next steps: Marcos will finish the final tests by Thursday, and Sofia will send the client a demo. Let me know if you have any questions. Best, Marcos
blocks.hw: Escribe tu email de resumen de una reunión (real o inventada) y envíamelo por WhatsApp para corregirlo juntos.
